creator: mel.xyzzy@rachie.is-a-geek.net
text:
Hi,

Just installed 6.4:

6.3-p$latest:
Nov 24 21:22:18 smell kernel: ad4: DMA limited to UDMA33, device found 
non-ATA66 cable
Nov 24 21:22:18 smell kernel: ad4: 610480MB <WDC WD6400AAKS-65A7B0 01.03B01> 
at ata2-master UDMA33
Nov 24 21:22:18 smell kernel: ad6: DMA limited to UDMA33, device found 
non-ATA66 cable
Nov 24 21:22:18 smell kernel: ad6: 610480MB <WDC WD6400AAKS-65A7B0 01.03B01> 
at ata3-master UDMA33

6.4-RELEASE:
Nov 29 04:00:14 smell kernel: ad4: 610480MB <WDC WD6400AAKS-65A7B0 01.03B01> 
at ata2-master SATA150
Nov 29 04:00:14 smell kernel: ad6: 610480MB <WDC WD6400AAKS-65A7B0 01.03B01> 
at ata3-master SATA150

No changes in Bios, hardware or anything other then source upgrade to 6.4. 
Looks like the bug is fixed at least in 6.4, which gives me hope for 7.1, but 
unfortunately, I can't take this machine out of commission to test it.
-- 
Mel
